statements.sql: select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `tags`.`id` in (1, 2, 3)

select `tags`.*, `job_tag`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_tag`.`tag_id` as `pivot_tag_id` from `tags` inner join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `job_tag`.`job_id` = 20
